phrases.intent_en: Ask where the seafront promenade is
phrases.cultural_note: Catania's lungomare runs along the Ionian Sea with views of Etna on clear days.

responses.english: Turn right at the end of this street.
responses.phonetic: JEE-ree ah DES-trah AL-lah FEE-neh dee KWES-tah VEE-ah.
responses.french: Giri a destra alla fine di questa via.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if you can swim at the waterfront
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, si può fare il bagno qui?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, see PWOH FAH-reh eel BAHN-yoh kwee?

responses.english: No, you need to go to Ognina or La Playa.
responses.phonetic: no, bee-ZON-yah an-DAH-reh ah oh-NYEE-nah oh lah PLAH-yah.
responses.french: No, bisogna andare a Ognina o La Playa.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to watch the sunset
phrases.text_local: Scusi, qual è il posto migliore per il tramonto?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, kwahl eh eel POS-toh meel-YOH-reh per eel trah-MON-toh?

responses.english: On the east pier, toward evening.
responses.phonetic: sool MOH-loh dee leh-VAN-teh, VER-soh SEH-rah.
responses.french: Sul molo di Levante, verso sera.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to take a boat trip
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si prendono le gite in barca?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see PREN-doh-noh leh JEE-teh een BAR-kah?

responses.english: At the tourist marina, near the lighthouse.
responses.phonetic: al POR-toh too-rees-TEE-koh, vee-CHEE-noh al FAH-roh.
responses.french: Al porto turistico, vicino al faro.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find a seafood restaurant
phrases.text_local: Scusi, c'è un buon ristorante di pesce sul lungomare?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, cheh oon bwohn rees-toh-RAN-teh dee PEH-sheh sool loon-goh-MAH-reh?

responses.english: Yes, along the front there are several.
responses.phonetic: see, sool loon-goh-MAH-reh cheh neh SOH-noh dee-VER-see.
responses.french: Sì, sul lungomare ce ne sono diversi.
